lines: Carter is out here collecting teams like Pokémon — Algeria drew 3-3, England smashed Panama, Colombia drew with Portugal, and DR Congo put three past Croft's Uzbekistan. Four squads, top of the sweepstake, the smug cunt.

Meanwhile Croft has France flying at the top of Group I and Norway cruising Group I too, yet somehow still only 17 points — mate, Uzbekistan just got absolutely twatted 3-1 by a team you also own. Work that one out.
Ellis is sitting pretty with Argentina going a perfect 9/9 and absolutely steamrolling Jordan 3-1 — the fuck is quietly building something dangerous while everyone else is flapping.

Jim's Morocco are joint top of Group C but Qatar have one point from three games and are already as good as dead — genuinely impressive to be holding a golden ticket that's worth less than a Greggs loyalty card.
Today's Round of 32 kicks off with 2A vs 2B — no one knows who they own yet, which means for approximately 90 minutes every single one of you cunts will think you're winning.
